variables.notes: CR:c||missing. Per rule (b), the explicit SG&A row exists but is mostly empty in the recent preview, so included it plus the closest overhead bucket 'Other operating expenses' for coverage across years. Excluded D&A, impairments, finance items, and the below-EBIT supplemental R&D row.

candidates.why: Only explicit R&D line present; appears below EBIT as supplemental disclosure, so acceptable for XRD but not for XSGA.

variables.notes: Mapped to the only dedicated R&D line. It appears below EBIT, so it was not added to XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best single recurring interest-expense line; already appears to aggregate lease and non-lease interest without needing additional components.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - positive
candidates.why: Lease-interest subcomponent with inconsistent sign presentation; not needed if total interest expense line is selected.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring lease-interest subcomponent, but would double count if combined with the total interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest - non lease
candidates.why: Recurring non-lease interest subcomponent, but total interest line is preferable to avoid summing components inconsistently across years.
Minority interest allocation, not finance cost.
Minority interest allocation, not finance cost.

candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest component only; not needed when total interest expense line exists.

Balance sheet accrual, not direct period finance cost line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Selected the single total recurring interest expense row and avoided double counting with underlying lease/non-lease components.

Equity component only, not total book equity.

Income statement allocation, not balance sheet minority equity.
